benefit_en: Rs 6,000 per year direct cash transfer in 3 instalments of Rs 2,000
steps_en: Visit pmkisan.gov.in or nearest CSC centre
Click 'New Farmer Registration'
Enter Aadhaar number and state
Fill land details and bank account
Submit and note registration number
scam_note: PM Kisan is 100% free. No agent or middleman needed. Report fraud to 155261.

benefit_en: Short-term credit up to Rs 3 lakh at 4% interest rate per annum
steps_en: Visit nearest bank branch or cooperative bank
Ask for Kisan Credit Card application form
Submit land records and Aadhaar
Bank verifies land records and processes KCC
Collect KCC card within 15 days
scam_note: KCC is issued free by banks. No processing fee for loans up to Rs 3 lakh. Report fraud to 1930.

benefit_en: Crop insurance at 2% premium for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi crops
steps_en: Register at pmfby.gov.in or CSC or bank
Select crop and insured area
Pay premium (2% for Kharif crops)
Get policy document
Report crop loss within 72 hours to bank/insurer
scam_note: Only pay the 2% farmer premium. Government pays the rest. Don't pay anyone else. Call 1800-180-1551 to report fraud.

name_hi: आयुष्मान भारत प्रधानमंत्री जन आरोग्य योजना
name_gu: આયુષ્મान ભારત પ્રધાનમંત્રી જન આરોગ્ય યોજના
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh per family per year free health insurance at empanelled hospitals
steps_en: Check eligibility at pmjay.gov.in or call 14555
Visit nearest Common Service Centre or hospital help desk
Submit Aadhaar and ration card
Get Ayushman card issued on the spot
Use card at any empanelled hospital for cashless treatment
scam_note: Ayushman card is issued FREE. No payment needed. Report fraud at 14555.

ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
benefit_en: Free LPG connection with stove and first refill cylinder
steps_en: Visit nearest LPG distributor (HP/Bharat/Indane)
Ask for Ujjwala application form
Submit Aadhaar, BPL card and bank details
Connection approved within 7 days
Collect cylinder and stove free of cost
scam_note: Connection is 100% free. No deposit. Report fraud at 1800-233-3555.

benefit_en: Free house worth Rs 1.2-1.3 lakh for rural BPL families
steps_en: Check name in PMAY-G beneficiary list at village panchayat
Submit application at Gram Panchayat office
Survey by government officials
Amount transferred in 3 instalments via DBT
Construct house as per approved plan
rejection_reasons: Name not in SECC 2011 priority list
scam_note: PMAY-G is completely free. No agent fee. Fraud helpline: 1800-11-6446.

ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefit_en: Home loan interest subsidy up to Rs 2.67 lakh for EWS/LIG/MIG
steps_en: Apply at pmaymis.gov.in or through bank
Select applicable component (CLSS/BLC/AHP)
Submit income and property documents
Subsidy credited to home loan account
Reduce EMI immediately
rejection_reasons: Already owns house in any city
scam_note: Apply only through official bank or government portal. No agent needed.

benefit_en: Rs 2 lakh accidental death/disability cover at just Rs 20 per year
steps_en: Visit bank or use net banking
Enrol in PM Suraksha Bima Yojana
Rs 20 auto-debited from bank account every June
Keep auto-debit active for continuous coverage
File claim through bank in case of accident
rejection_reasons: Auto-debit failed due to insufficient balance
scam_note: Only Rs 20/year. No agent commission. Enrol directly at your bank.

benefit_en: Rs 2 lakh life insurance cover at Rs 436 per year
steps_en: Visit bank or use net banking/mobile banking
Enrol in PMJJBY scheme
Rs 436 auto-debited annually
Nominee gets Rs 2 lakh on policyholder death
File claim within 30 days at bank
scam_note: Only Rs 436/year. Enrol directly at bank. No middleman needed.

benefit_en: Collateral-free business loan: Shishu (Rs 50K), Kishore (Rs 5L), Tarun (Rs 10L)
steps_en: Visit nearest bank, MFI or NBFC
Fill Mudra loan application
Submit business plan and identity documents
Bank appraises and sanctions loan
Get Mudra card (RuPay) for withdrawals
scam_note: Mudra loans are free to apply. Report any demand for fees at 1800-180-1111.

benefit_en: Zero-balance savings account with Rs 10,000 overdraft and Rs 2 lakh accidental cover
documents: Aadhaar card (or any one official document)
steps_en: Visit nearest bank or BC (Banking Correspondent) point
Fill PMJDY account opening form
Submit Aadhaar and photo
Account opened same day
Get RuPay debit card free
rejection_reasons: Already has bank account (can still apply if no-frills account)
scam_note: Account opening is completely free. Never pay anyone to open a Jan Dhan account.

benefit_en: 8.2% tax-free interest on savings for girl child education and marriage
steps_en: Visit post office or authorised bank
Fill SSY account opening form
Deposit minimum Rs 250 to open account
Deposit between Rs 250 to Rs 1.5 lakh per year
Account matures when girl turns 21
rejection_reasons: More than 2 girl children (only 2 accounts per family)
scam_note: Open only at post office or bank. No agent needed. Interest rate announced by government quarterly.

ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefit_en: Rs 6,000 maternity benefit in 3 instalments for first live birth
steps_en: Register pregnancy at nearest Anganwadi centre or health sub-centre
Fill PMMVY form (Form 1A) at Anganwadi
Submit after first antenatal check-up
Get Rs 3,000 first instalment
Get Rs 2,000 after delivery and Rs 1,000 after first vaccination
scam_note: PMMVY benefits come directly to your bank account. No middleman. Report issues to 7998799804.

ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
benefit_en: Free skill training + Rs 8,000 stipend + placement support + certificate
steps_en: Visit pmkvyofficial.org or nearest PMKVY training centre
Select skill course (IT, construction, healthcare, etc.)
Register online or at centre with Aadhaar
Complete free 3-6 month training
Appear for assessment and get NSQF certificate
scam_note: PMKVY training is completely free. Never pay any fee to training centres. Call 1800-123-9626.

benefit_en: Guaranteed pension of Rs 1,000 to Rs 5,000 per month after age 60
steps_en: Visit bank or use net banking
Fill APY registration form
Choose monthly pension amount (Rs 1K-5K)
Auto-debit set up based on age and chosen pension
Pension starts from age 60
rejection_reasons: Income tax payer (not eligible after Oct 2022)
scam_note: Enrol only through bank. No middleman. Check contributions at nps.proteantech.in.

ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefit_en: Collateral-free working capital loan: Rs 10,000 (1st), Rs 20,000 (2nd), Rs 50,000 (3rd)
documents: Vending certificate or letter of recommendation from ULB
steps_en: Apply at pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in or nearest bank
Get vending certificate from urban local body if needed
Submit Aadhaar and vending proof
Rs 10,000 credited to account in 7 days
Repay in 12 monthly instalments to get higher loan
scam_note: SVANidhi loan is free to apply. No processing fee for first loan. Report fraud at 1800-11-1979.

name_en: Indira Gandhi Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)
benefit_en: Rs 200-500 per month pension for BPL senior citizens
steps_en: Apply at Gram Panchayat (rural) or Urban Local Body office
Submit age proof, BPL card and Aadhaar
Application verified by village level worker
Pension sanctioned within 60 days
Amount credited directly to bank account monthly
scam_note: Pension comes directly to bank. No agent needed. Report fraud at 1800-11-0001.

ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefit_en: Free assistive devices (tricycle, hearing aid, crutches, wheelchair, etc.)
steps_en: Get disability certificate from government hospital (40%+ disability required)
Apply at nearest ALIMCO camp or district disability office
Submit disability certificate and income proof
Attend assessment camp for device fitting
Receive device free at camp
scam_note: ADIP devices are given absolutely free. No payment needed. Contact ALIMCO at 0512-2770873.

benefit_en: Rs 500-25,000 per year scholarships for pre-matric, post-matric and merit students
steps_en: Register at scholarships.gov.in
Select applicable scholarship scheme
Fill application with marks and income details
Upload documents
Institute verifies and scholarship credited
scam_note: NSP scholarships go directly to bank. Never pay anyone to apply. Helpline: 0120-6619540.

benefit_en: Bank loans Rs 10 lakh to Rs 1 crore for SC/ST/Women entrepreneurs
steps_en: Apply at standupmitra.in or nearest bank branch
Submit business plan and caste/gender documents
Bank appraises proposal
Composite loan (working capital + term) sanctioned
Repay over 7 years with moratorium of 18 months
scam_note: Apply directly at bank or standupmitra.in. No middleman fee. Helpline: 1800-180-1111.

name_en: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana
name_hi: पीएम सूर्य घर मुफ्त बिजली योजना
name_gu: પીએમ સૂર્ય ઘર મફત વીજળી યોજના
ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
benefit_en: Subsidy Rs 30,000-78,000 on solar rooftop + 300 free electricity units/month
steps_en: Register at pmsuryaghar.gov.in
Select empanelled vendor from portal
Get solar panel installed on rooftop
Apply for net metering from DISCOM
Subsidy credited to bank after inspection
rejection_reasons: Electricity connection not in applicant's name
scam_note: Use only empanelled vendors from portal. Subsidy comes to bank directly. Helpline: 1800-180-3333.

benefit_en: Free skill training + placement in formal jobs for rural youth (18-35)
steps_en: Register at ddugky.gov.in or visit nearest RSETI/DDU-GKY centre
Select trade and location
Undergo free 576 to 2304 hours training
Assessment and certification
Placement assistance in formal sector jobs
scam_note: DDU-GKY training is free. You also get post-placement support for 12 months.

name_en: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme (IGNWPS)
name_hi: इंदिरा गाँधी राष्ट्रीय विधवा पेंशन योजना
name_gu: ઇન્દિરા ગાંધી રાષ્ટ્રીય વિધવા પેન્શન યોજના
benefit_en: Rs 300-500 per month pension for BPL widows aged 40-79
steps_en: Apply at Gram Panchayat or Urban Local Body
Submit death certificate, BPL card and Aadhaar
Application verified within 30 days
Pension sanctioned and credited monthly
Widow certified as such by Gram Panchayat
scam_note: Pension credited directly to bank. No agent needed. Helpline: 1800-11-0001.

name_hi: इंदिरा गाँधी राष्ट्रीय विकलांग पेंशन योजना
name_gu: ઇન્દિરા ગાંધી રાષ્ટ્રીય દિવ્યાંગ પેન્શન યોજના
benefit_en: Rs 300-500 per month pension for BPL persons with 80%+ disability
steps_en: Get 80%+ disability certificate from civil surgeon
Apply at Gram Panchayat or ULB
Submit disability certificate and BPL card
Application verified and forwarded
Pension credited monthly to bank account
scam_note: Pension directly to bank. Report fraud at 1800-11-0001.

ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
benefit_en: Up to 60% subsidy on solar pumps + sell surplus solar power to grid
steps_en: Apply at state nodal agency or pmkusum.mnre.gov.in
Select component (standalone pump / grid pump / solar plant)
Submit land records and bank details
Pay farmer share (around 40%)
Solar pump installed by empanelled vendor
scam_note: Subsidy is credited directly. Use only empanelled vendors. Report fraud at 1800-180-3333.

benefit_en: Free soil testing + crop-wise nutrient and fertiliser recommendations
steps_en: Contact local Krishi Vigyan Kendra or agriculture office
Provide soil sample from your field
Sample tested free at government lab
Receive Soil Health Card with recommendations
Apply fertiliser as advised to save costs
scam_note: Soil testing is completely free under this scheme. No charges.

benefit_en: Sell crops online to buyers across India for better prices, no middlemen
steps_en: Register at enam.gov.in or nearest eNAM mandi
Get registered with local APMC mandi
Bring produce to mandi for quality assaying
Accept best online bid from buyers
Payment credited directly to bank account
scam_note: eNAM registration is free. Payment comes directly to your bank. No commission agents.

name_en: PM Krishi Sinchai Yojana (Per Drop More Crop)
benefit_en: Subsidy on drip and sprinkler micro-irrigation systems (45-55%)
steps_en: Apply at state agriculture/horticulture department or pmksy.gov.in
Select drip or sprinkler system
Field verification by department
Install system through approved vendor
Subsidy credited to bank after inspection
scam_note: Subsidy goes to your bank directly. Use approved vendors only.

benefit_en: Rs 3,000 per month pension after age 60 for small and marginal farmers
steps_en: Visit nearest CSC centre with Aadhaar and bank details
Enrol in PM Kisan Maandhan Yojana
Pay small monthly contribution (Rs 55-200 by age)
Government contributes equal amount
Pension of Rs 3,000/month starts at age 60
scam_note: Enrol free at CSC. Contribution auto-debited. No middleman fee.

ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
benefit_en: Subsidised insurance for cattle, buffalo, sheep, goat, pig against death
steps_en: Contact nearest veterinary office or animal husbandry department
Get animal health checked and tagged
Pay subsidised premium (govt pays up to 50%)
Animal insured for market value
Claim on animal death with vet certificate
scam_note: Pay only the subsidised premium share. Government covers the rest.

ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefit_en: Cash assistance Rs 700-1,400 for institutional delivery to pregnant women
steps_en: Register pregnancy with ASHA worker or at health centre
Get antenatal check-ups done
Deliver at a government or accredited hospital
ASHA worker helps process the cash benefit
Amount credited to bank account after delivery
scam_note: JSY money comes directly to your bank. ASHA worker assists free of charge.

ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefit_en: Free delivery, C-section, medicines, diagnostics and transport for mother and newborn
steps_en: Go to any government hospital for delivery
All services provided free — no payment at all
Free medicines and diagnostic tests included
Free transport home after delivery
Free treatment for sick newborns up to 1 year
scam_note: Everything under JSSK is 100% free at government hospitals. Never pay for delivery or medicines.

ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefit_en: Free health screening and treatment for children 0-18 years (defects, diseases, disabilities)
steps_en: Children screened free at Anganwadi, schools and health centres
RBSK mobile teams visit villages and schools
Identified conditions referred to district hospital
Free treatment including surgeries provided
Follow-up care arranged free of cost
scam_note: All screening and treatment is free. Never pay for child health services under RBSK.

ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefit_en: Awareness, education support and protection for the girl child
steps_en: Contact local Anganwadi or women and child development office
Enrol girl child in school
Link with Sukanya Samriddhi account for savings
Access awareness and counselling programmes
Benefit from convergence with education schemes
scam_note: This is an awareness and convergence scheme — services are free. Beware of fake registration fees.

ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefit_en: Subsidised daycare, nutrition and health for children 6 months to 6 years of working mothers
steps_en: Locate nearest Palna/creche centre via WCD office
Submit child and parent documents
Pay nominal subsidised monthly fee
Child gets daycare, meals and health check-ups
Centre open during working hours
scam_note: Fees are nominal and subsidised. Verify the centre is government-registered.

benefit_en: 7.5% interest on savings up to Rs 2 lakh for 2 years (women and girls)
steps_en: Visit post office or authorised bank
Fill Mahila Samman Savings Certificate form
Deposit between Rs 1,000 and Rs 2 lakh
Earn 7.5% fixed interest for 2 years
Partial withdrawal allowed after 1 year
scam_note: Open only at post office or bank. No agent needed. Fixed government interest rate.

benefit_en: Guaranteed pension at ~7.4% for senior citizens, investment up to Rs 15 lakh
steps_en: Visit LIC office or licindia.in
Choose pension mode (monthly/quarterly/yearly)
Invest lump sum up to Rs 15 lakh
Receive guaranteed pension for 10 years
Principal returned to nominee on maturity/death
scam_note: Buy only through LIC. No third-party agents needed. Pension credited to bank.

ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
benefit_en: Rs 15,000 toolkit + Rs 500/day skill stipend + collateral-free loan up to Rs 3 lakh at 5%
steps_en: Register at pmvishwakarma.gov.in via nearest CSC
Select your traditional trade (carpenter, blacksmith, potter, etc.)
Complete free skill training with Rs 500/day stipend
Receive Rs 15,000 toolkit voucher
Apply for collateral-free loan up to Rs 3 lakh
rejection_reasons: Trade not in the 18 listed crafts
scam_note: Registration and training are free. Toolkit and loan are genuine government benefits. Apply via CSC.

benefit_en: National database registration + Rs 2 lakh accidental insurance + access to welfare schemes
steps_en: Visit eshram.gov.in or nearest CSC
Register with Aadhaar-linked mobile (free self-registration)
Enter occupation and bank details
Receive e-Shram card with unique UAN number
Get Rs 2 lakh accidental insurance automatically
scam_note: e-Shram registration is completely free at eshram.gov.in or CSC. Never pay for the card.

benefit_en: Rs 3,000 per month pension after age 60 for unorganised sector workers
steps_en: Visit nearest CSC with Aadhaar and bank passbook
Enrol in PM Shram Yogi Maandhan
Pay monthly contribution (Rs 55-200 based on age)
Government matches your contribution equally
Pension of Rs 3,000/month from age 60
scam_note: Enrol free at CSC. Contribution auto-debited from bank. No agent fees.

benefit_en: Up to 35% subsidy on bank loans up to Rs 50 lakh to set up new enterprises
steps_en: Apply online at kviconline.gov.in/pmegp
Submit detailed project report for your business
Application reviewed by district task force
Bank sanctions loan with PMEGP margin money subsidy
Start enterprise; subsidy locked in after 3 years
scam_note: Apply only on the official KVIC portal. No agent can guarantee approval. Helpline: 1800-3000-0034.

name_hi: दीनदयाल अंत्योदय राष्ट्रीय ग्रामीण आजीविका मिशन
name_gu: દીનદયાળ અંત્યોદય રાષ્ટ્રીય ગ્રામીણ આજીવિકા મિશન
benefit_en: SHG formation + bank linkage loans at low interest for rural women
steps_en: Join or form a Self Help Group in your village
SHG registered under NRLM via block office
Group builds savings over a few months
Get community investment fund and bank loans
Use funds for livelihood activities
scam_note: Joining SHGs under NRLM is free. Loans are low-interest. Contact block development office.

name_hi: दीनदयाल अंत्योदय राष्ट्रीय शहरी आजीविका मिशन
name_gu: દીનદયાળ અંત્યોદય રાષ્ટ્રીય શહેરી આજીવિકા મિશન
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefit_en: Skill training, SHG support and subsidised loans for urban poor
steps_en: Contact City Mission Management Unit (ULB office)
Enrol for skill training or SHG formation
Complete training with placement support
Apply for subsidised self-employment loan
Receive interest subvention on the loan
scam_note: Training and SHG support are free. Apply through your urban local body office.

benefit_en: Rs 12,000 per year scholarship for meritorious students from Class 9 to 12
steps_en: Clear the NMMS state-level selection exam in Class 8
Register at scholarships.gov.in (National Scholarship Portal)
Submit marks and income certificate
School verifies application
Rs 12,000/year credited to bank from Class 9 to 12
scam_note: Scholarship goes directly to bank. Apply free on NSP. No agent needed.

benefit_en: Rs 50,000 per year for girl students in AICTE-approved technical diploma/degree courses
steps_en: Get admission to an AICTE-approved technical course
Apply at the AICTE Pragati scholarship portal
Upload admission and income documents
Institute verifies enrolment
Rs 50,000/year credited to bank account
scam_note: Apply only on the AICTE portal. Scholarship credited directly. No fees to apply.

ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
benefit_en: Paid apprenticeship with stipend + 25% (up to Rs 1,500/month) government support
steps_en: Register at apprenticeshipindia.gov.in
Search and apply for apprenticeship openings
Get selected by an employer
Receive monthly stipend during training
Earn a national apprenticeship certificate
rejection_reasons: Already completed apprenticeship in same trade
scam_note: Registration is free. Stipend is paid by employer with government support. No placement fees.

ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
benefit_en: 5 kg subsidised foodgrain per person per month (free under PMGKAY)
steps_en: Apply for ration card at food and civil supplies office
Submit Aadhaar and residence proof
Card issued after verification
Collect monthly foodgrain from fair price shop
Use One Nation One Ration Card to collect anywhere in India
rejection_reasons: Above poverty line / not eligible category
scam_note: Ration card is free. Foodgrain is subsidised/free. Report shop overcharging to the food department.

benefit_en: Free electricity connection for un-electrified households
steps_en: Contact local DISCOM office or electricity camp
Submit Aadhaar and household details
Free connection for SECC-listed poor households
Wiring and meter installed free
Start receiving electricity supply
scam_note: Connection is free for eligible poor households. Never pay a bribe for a meter.

ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefit_en: Free assistive devices (walking sticks, hearing aids, wheelchairs, dentures, spectacles) for poor seniors
steps_en: Watch for Rashtriya Vayoshri assessment camps via district office
Get assessed for required assistive devices
Submit BPL card and age proof
Devices fitted at distribution camp
Receive devices free of cost
scam_note: All devices are given free at camps. No payment. Contact ALIMCO or district social welfare office.
